title: Merchandising Executive
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Sales & Merchandising Executive to support the growth of our toy distribution business. The role involves managing retail accounts, ensuring effective in-store merchandising, and maintaining strong relationships with retailers. The ideal candidate has experience in field sales, retail merchandising, and a good understanding of consumer products or toys.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Account Management

  • Manage and grow assigned retail accounts, including toy stores, department stores, and specialty retailers.

  • Execute sales plans to achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets.

  • Promote new product launches, promotions, and seasonal campaigns.

  • Collect orders, monitor stock levels, and follow up on replenishment requirements.

  • Build strong relationships with store owners, managers, and buyers.

Merchandising & In-Store Execution

  • Ensure products are displayed according to company merchandising guidelines and planograms.

  • Set up and maintain attractive in-store displays, end caps, and promotional areas.

  • Monitor product visibility, pricing accuracy, and shelf placement.

  • Ensure proper stock rotation and minimize damaged or obsolete inventory.

  • Support store setups for festive seasons, promotions, and product launches.

Inventory & Operations Support

  • Coordinate with warehouse and logistics teams to ensure timely delivery of orders.

  • Track sell-in and sell-out performance.

  • Assist with stock counts and reconciliation when required.

Requirements & Qualifications

  • 1–3 years of experience in sales and/or merchandising (consumer goods, toys, or retail preferred).

  • Experience working with retail stores and field sales activities.

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

  • Self-motivated, well-organized, and able to work independently.

  • Willingness to travel to retail outlets.
